relationships: ber:Ad d-uɣalen seg uɣerbaz s axxam zik
ber:Seg zik i yebɣa ad yesɛu weltma-s tamecṭuḥt
ber:Mary tenna-d dakken seg zik ay tella d taddalant
ber:Tom yenna-d dakken seg zik ay yella d addalan
ber:Imir-a atan idus ugar akk n wakken yella zik
ber:Yemma-s n Gunter tella tetteddu ad d-teqqel ɣer taddart zik
ber:Ziri seg zik i yettṛuḥu s axxam ɣef uḍar
ber:Seg zik ay lliɣ bɣiɣ ad lemdeɣ tabretonit
ber:Yemma-s n Gunter tella tetteddu ad d-teqqel ɣer uxxam zik
ber:A win yufan ad ddun ɣer tneɣrit zik
ber:Seg zik i bɣiɣ ad giǧǧeɣ ɣer Tmurt n Leqbayel
